description: <munder> / <mover> / <munderover> — accents (accent='true', or a single-character role=accent over/under script) go through the accent handler and emit a position marker ⠘/⠰; otherwise they are handled as sub/sup (big-operator limits, etc.). For per-character accent encodings see math_accents.json.

known_accents.description: Known accents (zero MATH_* warnings) — focus on over/under position and multi-character bases

cases.note: dot directly above = base + above marker ⠘ + dot ⠂
multi-character base overline: one ⠰ covers the same-class run xy + above marker ⠘ + bar, two letters ⠒⠒
multi-character base underline: one ⠰ for the run xy + below marker ⠰ + bar, two letters ⠒⠒
vector arrow mark, single letter: → remapped in the accent position to ⠘ + ⠒⠂ (≠ relation arrow ⠒⠕)
vector arrow mark, two letters ⠘ + ⠒⠆ (base 2 letters, one ⠰ for the run)

unknown_accents.description: Unknown accents — trigger MATH_UNKNOWN_SYMBOL (the position marker is still emitted)

cases.note: hat ^ not yet recorded → above marker ⠘ + unknown cell (math-symbols-plan S5)
